errors.message: The quantifier '-?' is always entered despite having a minimum of 0. This is because the assertion '\b' contradicts with the element(s) after the quantifier. Either set the minimum to 1 ({1}) or change the assertion.
The alternative 'a' can never be entered because it contradicts with the assertion '\b'. Either change the alternative or assertion to resolve the contradiction.
The quantifier 'a*' can never be entered because its element contradicts with the assertion '\b'. Change or remove the quantifier or change the assertion to resolve the contradiction.
The quantifier '[a\q{foo|bar}]*' can never be entered because its element contradicts with the assertion '\b'. Change or remove the quantifier or change the assertion to resolve the contradiction.

The quantifier '[\s\S]*?' is always entered despite having a minimum of 0. This is because the assertion '^' contradicts with the element(s) after the quantifier. Either set the minimum to 1 (+?) or change the assertion.
